reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an already installed RHEL 9 system requires modifying dracut configuration and kernel boot parameters, which is not supported and can render the system unbootable. This change involves bootloader and initramfs modifications, posing a high risk of lockout or system failure.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; FIPS mode activation; kernel parameter change; bootloader configuration; potential system unbootable
